ops.text: great-docs 0.15 silently ignores unknown config keys: capt-hook's great-docs.yml carries `fast_sidebar: true`, but no such key exists anywhere in great-docs 0.15.0 source — unknown keys are retained during config merge and never validated, so the setting is a no-op that reads as load-bearing. Cost a wrong lead while diagnosing the 9-minute docs build. Follow-up: drop the key from capt-hook's .claude/fragments great-docs.yml fragment; check source before trusting any config-key perf claim.
